_doc: Editorial overrides for outbreak alerts, keyed by alert.id. Open /outbreaks?curate=1 to see each alert's id. Supported per entry: 'hidden' (true -> drop the alert, e.g. a duplicate), 'title'/'summary' (plain-language rewrite), 'pinned' (sort to top), 'coords' ({lat,lng} map position); country-tag fixes 'replace'/'add'/'remove'. Most alerts need no entry. Examples: { 'who-don-ebola-uganda-dup': { 'hidden': true } } or { 'cdc-yf-venezuela': { 'add': ['colombia'] } }

who-don-y3rir8.title: Ebola (Bundibugyo virus) — DR Congo & Uganda
who-don-y3rir8.summary: An outbreak of Bundibugyo Ebola virus with cases across the DRC and Uganda. No licensed vaccine exists for this Ebola species, so control relies on surveillance, isolation, and contact tracing.
